cards.name: Razor Stance
cards.description: Aura 10s: your hits apply Bleed 1 (scales DEX). Vengeance: +4s.

cards.name: Bloodprice Strike
cards.description: Lose 4 HP (Pierce). Deal 12 (scales STR). +2 Rage. +1 Stamina.

cards.name: Kindle Strike
cards.description: Deal 5 (scales STR). Burn 2 (scales INT). Vulnerable Fire 1 (5s).

cards.name: Crimson Tithe
cards.description: Lose 5 HP. +1 Stamina, +1 Mana (scales SPI). Aura 6s: HP loss → +1 Rage.

cards.name: Granite Lunge
cards.description: Armor 4 (scales VIT). Deal 3 + 1 per 4 Armor (scales STR). +1 Stamina.

cards.name: Iron Reckoning
cards.description: Armor 4 (scales VIT). Stance 8s: hits +1 per Rage (scales STR).

cards.name: Cinderscar
cards.description: Burn 2 (scales INT). Vengeance (<60% HP): convert 2 Burn into Bleed.

cards.name: Bloodtide Mend
cards.description: Heal 5 (scales SPI). Vengeance: Heal 4. Self Bleed 2.

cards.name: Forge Spike Ward
cards.description: Armor 5 (scales VIT). Aura 8s: on hit taken, deal 2 + 1 per 6 Armor (scales STR).

cards.name: Bedrock Snare
cards.description: Slow 2 (scales INT). If enemy has Slow ≥ 4: Stun 1.

cards.name: Crimson Spiral
cards.description: Damage = Rage × 2 (Pierce, scales STR). +1 Bleed per Rage. Consume all Rage.

cards.name: Bulwark Salvo
cards.description: Deal 6 + 1 per 2 Armor ×2 (scales STR, no consume).

cards.name: Bloodlash Salvo
cards.description: Per Bleed: 3 Pierce (scales STR). Vengeance: +2 Pierce per Bleed. No consume.

cards.name: Cleaver's Tax
cards.description: Deal 12 Pierce (scales STR). Overload: -5 Rage, +20 dmg, lockout 4s.

cards.name: Wrathshell Vow
cards.description: Exhaust. Channel 4s, then aura: +1 Rage every 3s (scales STR). On hit taken: +1 Rage.

cards.name: Razor Cadence
cards.description: Deal 5 ×3 (scales DEX). Each hit: Bleed 1. Vengeance: ×4 hits.

cards.name: Last Stand Bulwark
cards.description: Armor 10 (scales VIT). Berserk (<50% HP): +10 Armor and 12 Pierce (scales STR).

cards.name: Vein Splitter
cards.description: Deal 4 ×3 (scales DEX). Each hit: Bleed +1 per existing Bleed.

cards.name: Supernova
cards.description: Exhaust. Consume all Burn: 5 Pierce per stack consumed (AoE, scales INT).

cards.name: Quench Lance
cards.description: Convert 3 Burn into Bleed. Deal 4 per Bleed (scales STR). Burn 2 (scales INT).

cards.name: Pyre Surge
cards.description: +2 to every Burn on enemy (scales INT). Vulnerable Fire 3 (8s).

cards.name: Magma Welling
cards.description: Armor 14 (scales VIT). Burn 8 (scales INT). Slow cooldown.

cards.name: Cinder Squall
cards.description: Slow 3 AoE (scales INT). If Slow ≥ 5: Stun 1. 2 damage per Slow stack.

cards.name: Dust Plague
cards.description: Armor 8 (scales VIT). Aura 12s: every 2.5s apply Slow 1 AoE (scales INT). ≥5 Slow → Stun.

cards.name: Bog Catalyst
cards.description: Poison 2 (scales INT). Catalyze x2: doubles Poison on enemy.

cards.name: Steaming Plague
cards.description: Poison 3 AoE (scales INT). +2 extra Poison on already-poisoned enemies.

cards.name: Alchemic Drain
cards.description: Consume up to 4 Poison: Heal 4 per stack consumed (scales SPI).

cards.name: Marsh Squall
cards.description: Exhaust. Spread 50% Poison AoE. 4 Pierce per Poison consumed (scales INT).

cards.name: Pyric Bulwark
cards.description: Armor 12 (scales VIT). Aura 14s: on Armor gained ≥ 4 → Burn 1 (scales INT).

cards.name: Stagnant Bulwark
cards.description: Armor 10 (scales VIT). Aura 12s: every 2s apply Poison 1 (scales INT).

cards.name: Twinflame Flicker
cards.description: Burn 3 (scales INT). Echo: re-apply Burn 2 after 1.5s.

cards.name: Vengeful Pyre
cards.description: Exhaust. Devour 1 common: +12 Rage (scales STR). Burn 6 (scales INT).

cards.name: Crimson Cascade
cards.description: Self Bleed 1. Aura 15s: on enemy kill with Bleed, spread 50% Bleed to nearest.

cards.name: Wrath Squall
cards.description: On 30 Rage: deal 40 (scales STR) + Slow 8 (scales INT). Reset Rage.

cards.name: Necrotic Festering
cards.description: Self Bleed 3 (scales DEX). Apply Poison = Self Bleed (scales INT). Pierce per stack pair.

cards.name: Thunderstrike Catalyst
cards.description: Deal 6 (scales STR). Consume 4 Slow: +6 Pierce per stack consumed (scales INT).

cards.name: Ashen Bulwark
cards.description: Armor 12 (scales VIT). Brace: Deal 12. Brace: Burn 2.

cards.name: Crimson Regen Mantle
cards.description: Armor 8 (scales VIT). Aura 12s: while HP<50%, heal 3/s (scales SPI). DR 20%.

cards.name: Glacial Pact
cards.description: Slow 4 (scales INT). Armor 8 (scales VIT). Frenzy: CD -30% below 50% HP.

cards.name: Tombplate
cards.description: Armor 18 (scales VIT). Guard 40%: Armor 10 (15s). Guard 40%: +4 Rage (15s).

cards.name: Searing Razor
cards.description: Bleed 2 (scales DEX). Burn 2 (scales INT). Aura 10s: CD -10% per 25% missing HP.

cards.name: Venom Dance
cards.description: Poison 3 (scales INT). Spread to 2 targets (50%). Vengeance: convert 5 Bleed→Poison.

cards.name: Drowning Lance
cards.description: Consume all Poison: 3 Pierce per stack consumed (scales INT).

cards.name: Tremor Detonate
cards.description: Exhaust. Deal 6 + 3× (Poison + Bleed + Burn) (scales STR). Consume all.

cards.name: Slag Maul
cards.description: Deal 14 (scales STR). Brace: Deal 12. Brace: Burn 2.

cards.name: Citadel Inferno
cards.description: Exhaust. Spend ALL Armor: AoE Pierce = Armor × 2 (scales STR). Requires Armor ≥ 10.

cards.name: Brineward
cards.description: Armor 14 (scales VIT). Heal 8 (scales SPI). Poison 2 (scales INT).

cards.name: Bedrock Bulwark
cards.description: Armor 16 (scales VIT). Aura 15s: on Armor break → re-arm Armor 6 (scales VIT).

cards.name: Steam Bulwark
cards.description: Armor 14 (scales VIT). Brace: Poison 3. Brace: Burn 2.

cards.name: Ember Aegis Gust
cards.description: Convert all Burn → Armor (cap 20, scales VIT). Haste 15% (6s, scales INT).

cards.name: Magmaplate
cards.description: Armor 16 (scales VIT). Brace: Deal 14. Brace: Burn 2.

cards.name: Slipvenom Tempo
cards.description: Poison 3 (scales INT). Haste 15% (6s). Echo if Poison ≥ 10.

cards.name: Gale Echo
cards.description: Aura 12s: Slow effects apply +1 extra (scales INT). Haste 15% (6s).

cards.name: Stormstone Tempo
cards.description: Channel: Deal 6 (scales DEX, +25%/s held, max +100%). Shatter: 6 Pierce (scales STR).

cards.name: Brine Crucible
cards.description: Overload (+3s next CD): convert all Burn → Bleed (1:2, scales DEX).

cards.name: Tidefoot Bloom
cards.description: Convert all Poison → Bleed 1:1 (scales DEX). Echo 1 (6s, scales INT).

cards.name: Magmavow
cards.description: Armor 10 (scales VIT). Brace: 16 Pierce. Brace: Burn 2.

cards.name: Tempestbleed
cards.description: Self Bleed 2. Brace: Deal 6. Brace: Slow 2.

cards.name: Bogwrath
cards.description: Armor 10 (scales VIT). Brace: Poison 4. Brace: +3 Rage.

cards.name: Tectonic Reckoning
cards.description: Exhaust. Stun 3 AoE (scales INT). Force-trigger every card you own once.
